site.name: Example Game Guide
site.description: A verification-aware Roblox game guide template for codes, tier lists, units, updates, beginner guidance, and high-intent safety pages.

game.name: Example Roblox Game
game.descriptionSummary: Replace this summary with verified game information from official sources.
game.codeSystemSignal: Unknown until verified from official or in-game evidence.

codes.verificationPolicy: Do not publish active codes without official or in-game proof.
codes.thirdPartyConflictSummary: No third-party code claims have been reviewed for this template.

redeemGuide.note: Replace with verified in-game redemption steps only after checking the game.

verificationChecklist: Check the official Roblox game page.
Check developer-linked official channels only after source verification.
Run an in-game redemption test before promoting any code to active.
Record source, date, and result for every code change.
codes.screenshotPlaceholder: No screenshot proof has been added.
codes.whyOtherSitesShowCodes: Other sites may publish unverified codes. This template keeps unverified claims separate from verified active codes.
